channel.title: Pigsty – Category: STAT
channel.description: Recent content in Category: STAT on Pigsty

item.title: Docs: pg_proctab
item.description:
Overview

PIGSTY 3rd Party Extension: pg_proctab : PostgreSQL extension to access the OS process table

Information

  • ID: 5100
  • Name: pg_proctab
  • Alias: pg_proctab
  • Category: STAT
  • Website: https://github.com/markwkm/pg_proctab
  • License: BSD 3 License
  • Language: Unknown
  • Tags: not-used
  • Comment: 无

Metadata

  • Version: 0.0.10
  • PG Vers: 16,15,14,13,12
  • Need Load: Lib Loading NOT Required
  • Need DDL: DO CREATE EXTENSION DDL
  • Relocatable: Not Relocatable
  • Trusted: Untrusted, Require Superuser to Create
  • Schemas: N/A
  • Requires: N/A

Packages

  • RPM Repo: PIGSTY
  • RPM Name: pg_proctab_$v*
  • RPM Ver : 0.0.10
  • RPM Deps: Nil
  • DEB Repo: PIGSTY
  • DEB Name: postgresql-$v-pg-proctab
  • DEB Ver : 0.0.10
  • DEB Deps: Nil

Details

item.title: Docs: pg_profile

  • Comment: 无

Metadata

  • PG Vers: 16,15,14,13,12

  • Need DDL: DO CREATE EXTENSION DDL
  • Relocatable: Relocatable
  • Trusted: Untrusted, Require Superuser to Create
  • Schemas: N/A
  • Requires: dblink, plpgsql

item.title: Docs: pg_show_plans
item.description:

item.title: Docs: pg_stat_monitor
item.description:
Overview

PGDG 3rd Party Extension: pg_stat_monitor : The pg_stat_monitor is a PostgreSQL Query Performance Monitoring tool, based on PostgreSQL contrib module pg_stat_statements. pg_stat_monitor provides aggregated statistics, client information, plan details including plan, and histogram information.

Information

  • ID: 6030
  • Name: pg_stat_monitor
  • Alias: pg_stat_monitor
  • Category: STAT
  • Website: https://github.com/percona/pg_stat_monitor
  • License: BSD 3 License
  • Language: Unknown
  • Tags: N/A
  • Comment: 无

Metadata

  • Version: 2.1
  • PG Vers: 16,15,14,13,12
  • Need Load: Explicit Loading Required
  • Need DDL: DO CREATE EXTENSION DDL
  • Relocatable: Not Relocatable
  • Trusted: Untrusted, Require Superuser to Create
  • Schemas: N/A
  • Requires: N/A

Packages

  • RPM Repo: PGDG
  • RPM Name: pg_stat_monitor_$v*
  • RPM Ver : 2.1
  • RPM Deps: Nil
  • DEB Repo: PIGSTY
  • DEB Name: postgresql-$v-pg-stat-monitor
  • DEB Ver : 2.1
  • DEB Deps: Nil

Details
